{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Cloud Hammer
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Cloud Hammer]] is respected for mobility and force.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
